zh.label: 低强度活动
zh.description: 以静坐为主，很少或没有额外的体力活动。常见于办公室职员、司机、久坐的退休人员等。

en.label: Low Activity
en.description: Predominantly sedentary, with little or no additional physical activity. Common for office workers, drivers, sedentary retirees, etc.

zh.label: 中等强度活动
zh.description: 工作中需要较多站立、行走或轻度体力劳动，或每周有 3-5 次中等强度锻炼。例如销售人员、家庭主妇、学生等。

en.label: Moderate Activity
en.description: Involves substantial standing, walking, or light physical labor at work, or with 3-5 times of moderate exercise per week. Examples: salespeople, homemakers, students.

zh.label: 高强度活动
zh.description: 从事重体力劳动或高强度职业（如建筑工人、农民），或每日坚持高强度运动（如长跑、游泳、球类运动）。

en.label: High Activity
en.description: Engaged in heavy manual labor or high-intensity occupations (e.g., construction workers, farmers), or daily vigorous exercise (e.g., long-distance running, swimming, ball sports).
